name: @echo/data-plane
description: R-4 first slice: the supplier adapter matrix (REFACTOR_PROPOSAL.md §4.5) — port interfaces + authorization metadata + a router that picks by authorization -> quality -> latency. Wraps the existing tested fetch logic in src/*.js rather than re-implementing it; today only one adapter per port exists (the legacy free-tier composite), so the router is a no-op in practice until a licensed adapter is registered alongside it.
